name: ascii-profile-card
description: GitHub Action that generates Neofetch-style SVG profile cards with daily ASCII art and live GitHub stats.
author: Ruslan Khasanshin

scripts.check:render: rm -rf out && CONFIG="$(cat example-config.yml)" bun run generate && xmllint --noout out/dark_mode.svg out/light_mode.svg && grep -q 'Mona Lisa Octocat' out/dark_mode.svg && grep -q 'on GitHub' out/light_mode.svg
scripts.check: bun lint && bun check:action && bun check:workflows && bun check:types && bun check:unused && bun check:vulns && bun check:render
scripts.prepare: if [ -n "${CI:-}" ] || [ "${LEFTHOOK:-}" = "0" ]; then exit 0; fi; lefthook install
